title: An Act relative to refunds and customer service standards for food delivery platforms

abstracts.abstract: By Mr. Rush, a petition (accompanied by bill) (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Michael F. Rush for legislation relative to refunds and customer service standards for food delivery platforms.  Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
